title: Branding
description: Settings for the JupyterLab Branding Extension - controls how the system name in the top header is rendered.

capitalize.title: Capitalize system name
capitalize.description: When enabled, render the system name in uppercase via CSS text-transform. Off by default - to show the name uppercase, simply type it uppercase in the deployment config.

colorMode.title: System name colour mode
colorMode.description: Auto uses the JupyterLab theme colour (matches sidebar font). Custom uses the hex colour below.

customColor.title: Custom hex colour
customColor.description: Hex colour applied when 'System name colour mode' is set to Custom (e.g. '#ff8800'). Ignored when mode is Auto.
